programme.sub-title: Lady Flees Police Twice; Thieves Steal Money, Ice Cream Cake
programme.desc: Crimes from across the country that have been captured by ordinary people on their smartphones; stories of victims, witnesses, law enforcement and the videographers themselves.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Graham gets a true taste of Florida with Gov. Ron DeSantis. After a stop at the Governor's Mansion, they trek into the Everglades for a python hunt. DeSantis also opens up about personal tragedy and the scrutiny surrounding his administration.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Coffee With America
programme.desc: A visit to the colorful flower fields of Carlsbad, Calif.; tips for planning seasonal getaways; fresh ideas to upgrade your life this spring -- from the latest must-have tech to improving your sleep routine; Autism Awareness Month; new all-inclusive travel experiences in Las Vegas; a global culinary journey to Hong Kong; a relaxing escape to Los Cabos; expert advice on building a healthier relationship with food.

programme.title: Under Eye Bags? SOLUTION!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Jack Hibbs -- Real Life
programme.desc: It's my desire that through Jesus Christ, you will know real life!

programme.desc: Rep. Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.); acting Attorney General Todd Blanche; panel with Kellyanne Conway, Susan Page, Karl Rove and Juan Williams.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: FOX Sports: Voices
programme.desc: Amon-Ra St. Brown empowers youth, Urban Meyer spotlights a military foundation, Mookie Betts earns the Roberto Clemente Award, and the Villanova Wildcats inspire through a special team manager.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR RaceDay
programme.desc: NASCAR fans get the very latest on the day's big race with this preview show featuring up-to-the-minute analysis, driver interviews, predictions and more. Host Shannon Spake is joined by analysts Chris Myers, Adam Alexander, Kaitlyn Vincie, and others.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series reaches Alabama for a 188-lap race at Talladega Superspeedway. Tyler Reddick looks to build on his recent win at Kansas, while Brad Keselowski seeks his second victory of the campaign at this 2.66-mile tri-oval circuit.

programme.desc: Full, uncut interviews with some of the big names in Sports.

programme.desc: Teams compete on a 50-mile course, with 25,000 feet of climbing for Austria's Peak to Creek.

programme.desc: Proteins must be paired with perfectly poured beer to create delicious dishes; contestants play beer pong in order to win more ingredients.

programme.title: Sherri

programme.desc: Comic Nikki Glaser; singer Bilal performs his song "Lay Around"; a once a top-ranked track star told he'd never walk again defies the odds; a 12-year-old fashion designer.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A mother of two who vanishes during a storm turns out to be a victim of something sinister.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Teams compete to see who can guess secret words or phrases with a limited amount of clues and time; host Meredith Vieira.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.sub-title: The Stakes Were Massive in This Game
programme.desc: The clues feel strong, but the answer won't settle; can they commit to the big word before time runs out?

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.

programme.desc: Latest local and regional news.

programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Extra
programme.desc: Inside the entertainment newsgathering process, as reporters coast to coast break headlines, advance the stories of the day, and sit down with celebrities.

programme.title: TMZ
programme.desc: TMZ TV tracks down today's hottest stars with their cameras, whether they are hitting the clubs or the dry cleaners.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: A contestant with a spot-on Barack Obama impression, a former "Walking Dead" zombie actor, and a past guest of "The Jerry Springer Show" are among the contestants.
